## Boundary check

- [ ] This does not claim Roundtable works without Lingtai.
- [ ] This does not require committing `.lingtai/`, mailbox files, logs, or credentials.
- [ ] This keeps the coding terminal as Executor and Lingtai agents as advisors.

Do not paste secrets, tokens, mailbox contents, `.lingtai/`, or private runtime files.
